package.name: uav_traj_landing
package.description:
GPS-denied autonomous landing on the Otter USV using time-optimal trajectory planning and a Sliding Mode Controller (Super-Twisting Algorithm) for trajectory tracking.
Architecture mirrors ar_code_landing but replaces the altitude/position PID with: 1. Minimum-jerk polynomial trajectory (default, no extra deps) — or time-optimal trajectory via rpg_time_optimal (optional) 2. Sliding Mode Controller with Super-Twisting Algorithm for tracking (adapted from CrazyTraj/lsy_drone_racing/control/sliding_mode_controller.py)
The gimbal_aruco_tracker_node from ar_code_landing is reused unchanged. Only the controller and state machine nodes are new.
